creator: tg@ihf.rwth-aachen.de
text:
asami@cs.berkeley.edu (Satoshi Asami) writes:

>  * I've looked at the MASTER_SITE but they didn't update the package
>  * since 1993. If it's no longer maintained we should probably remove
>  * the port.
> 
> I agree.  Go ahead and remove it.
> 
> Satoshi

Any chance to mark it so that Peter doesn't remove it from the attic?
Just in case it's going to be updated one fine day, ``when the Moon is
in the seventh house, and Jupiter aligned with Mars''.

tg
